seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Old Bonalbo and Old Grevillia. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Old Bonalbo vs Old Grevillia: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Old Bonalbo and Old Grevillia.
heading: Old Bonalbo vs Old Grevillia — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Old Bonalbo, New South Wales and Old Grevillia, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Old Grevillia has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Old Bonalbo (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Old Bonalbo or Old Grevillia safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Old Bonalbo has a flood risk score of 53/100, while Old Grevillia scores 39/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Old Bonalbo scores 51/100 for bushfire risk. Old Grevillia scores 40/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Old Bonalbo or Old Grevillia?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Old Grevillia has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.98% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
